description: Schema for the final merged dataset used for modeling.
source: Merge of GitHub Metrics and NVD CVE Counts

columns.name: url
columns.description: Full HTTPS URL of the GitHub repository.

columns.name: cve_count
columns.description: Count of associated CVEs. 0 if no match found.

columns.name: project_age
columns.description: Age of project in years (calculated from creation date to now).

columns.name: release_count
columns.description: Number of releases (placeholder for future enrichment).

cleaning_rules: Exclude rows where unique_authors is null.
